# RxBODYFx

> RxBODYFx is a physician-led medical weight loss and hormone optimization practice based in Friendswood, Texas, offering in-person care locally and telehealth care in all 50 states through a partnership with Asher Health. The practice is led by Eleanor Hethcox, DNP, with Dr. Jack Janoe, MD (40+ years, Family Medicine and Sports Medicine) as Supervising Physician.

## Services

- [Get Started](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/get-started/): Interactive 3-question tool to help visitors identify which program fits their goals before booking a consultation.

- [Medical Weight Loss](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/services/medical-weight-loss/): GLP-1 therapy (semaglutide, tirzepatide) and non-medical weight management, built on five pillars of health (diet, exercise, nutrition, hormone optimization, sleep). Medication cost is included in the program, no insurance required.
- [Hormone Optimization](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/services/hormone-optimization/): Testosterone and hormone therapy for fatigue, mood, and weight-related symptoms.
- [Nutrition & Coaching](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/services/nutrition-coaching/): Dedicated nutrition coach paired with every patient.
- [Primary Care](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/services/primary-care/): Routine check-ups, vaccinations, chronic disease management.
- [Health Screenings](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/services/health-screenings/): Blood pressure, cholesterol, glucose, BMI, cancer screenings.
- [Lab Work](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/services/lab-work/): Bloodwork, genetic, and food sensitivity testing via RUPA lab partnership.
- [Telehealth (All 50 States)](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/telehealth/): Virtual visits, prescription management, and remote patient monitoring via the RxBODYFx app, available nationwide through the Asher Health partnership.

## Learn

- [Research & Evidence](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/research/): Published clinical trial data, a national obesity statistics dashboard (CDC/NHANES), a glossary, links to trusted external sources (Obesity Medicine Association, The Obesity Society, CDC, NIDDK/NIH, named researchers), and patient stories.
- [Blog](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/blog/): Categorized patient education library across medication, weight loss, hormones, lifestyle, preventive care, and telehealth topics, including: semaglutide vs. tirzepatide, GLP-1 results timelines, stopping GLP-1 medication, compounded vs. brand-name GLP-1, weight loss plateaus, perimenopause and weight gain, TRT myths vs. facts, sleep and weight management, stress/cortisol and weight, understanding bloodwork, remote patient monitoring, and telehealth legitimacy.
- [FAQ](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/faq/): Common questions about the program, telehealth eligibility, and privacy.

## Team

- [Our Team](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/team/): Eleanor Hethcox, DNP (Clinical Director); Dr. Jack Janoe, MD (Supervising Physician); James Hethcox (Chief Operating Officer); Diana Pena (Clinic Manager).

## Location & Contact

Friendswood, Texas (Galveston / Harris County, Houston metro area). Telehealth available in all 50 states.
[Contact](https://www.rxbodyfx.com/contact/)
